name: Beef Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound cooked beef, cut into julienne strips
1/8 pound tiger prawn, finely minced raw
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a wok over a moderate flame.
2. Add the beef, napa cabbage, scallions, bean sprouts, mushrooms, bamboo shoots, and shrimp. Stir-fry quickly for 1-2 minutes until the shrimp turns pink.
3. Add the soy sauce, white wine, and chicken stock to the wok. Heat and stir for 2 minutes.
4. Combine cornstarch with water (mix well) and add it to the wok. Heat and stir until thickened.
5. Remove from heat, season to taste, and allow to cool completely.
6. Divide the filling mixture into equal portions. Place one portion onto the corner of each egg roll skin.
7. Fold the opposite corner over the filling, brushing lightly with beaten egg.
8. Fold over the filling and press gently to seal. Brush the remaining corner lightly with egg mixture.
9. Roll up the remaining corner, pressing gently to seal.
10. Repeat with the remaining filling and skins.
11. Heat oil to 360 degrees.
12. Fry the rolls 1-2 at a time until lightly browned on all sides.
13. Drain well on a cooling rack and blot with paper towels.
14. Serve hot, with assorted dipping sauces to the side.
